apiKeyId.label: API Key ID
apiKeyId.help: API key ID for Kalshi (or use ${KALSHI_API_KEY_ID})

privateKeyPath.label: Private Key Path
privateKeyPath.help: Path to the PEM file containing your RSA private key for API authentication (or use ${KALSHI_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH})

mode.label: Trading Mode
mode.help: Use "demo" for simulated trading on demo-api.kalshi.co (no real money) or "live" for real trading on trading-api.kalshi.com. Defaults to "demo".
